arts.ttl: Mark Robins takes Stoke City encouragement as he hints at injury boost
arts.sum: Robins said: “I’ve been there twice already this season with Coventry, one in the League Cup and one in the league, and they’re a good young team. “The players coming back have got quality and game understanding, they’ve got a lot of Championship experience under their belt.

arts.ttl: What Bristol City can expect from Stoke City and Mark Robins after 'exhausting' start to season
arts.sum: Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community. After a tough start to the season, Stoke seem to have found their feet under the management of Mark Robins.

arts.ttl: Nathan Lowe opens up on Stoke City truth, strike idol and beating imposter syndrome
arts.sum: “It’s a belief thing but he’s going around, getting his arm around all of us, making sure we’re all in the same boat, and then when players get confidence in themselves they take more risks, take more shots – that’s a big thing he wants us to do, take more shots. “I think that’s the biggest difference so far and I’d be lying if I said I hadn’t struggled a little bit to get to grips with that,” he said, ahead of tonight’s trip to Bristol City (7.45pm).

arts.ttl: Every word Liam Manning said on Stoke City test, Max O'Leary, Bristol City progress and more
arts.sum: The chances that did come your way today, it seemed like every header was just an inch over, is it just a lack of quality do you think? I think when you look at it now this season, the progress and the performances, the players are getting better, the teams are getting better, there's clarity in what we're trying to do.

arts.ttl: Liam Manning makes Sinclair Armstrong officiating point after Bristol City's defeat to Swansea
arts.sum: Liam Manning has admitted he feels for Sinclair Armstrong after Bristol City's defeat to Swansea City as he believes the officials don't award the forward fouls because of his physical attributes. Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community.

arts.ttl: What has been said about Bosun Lawal's position as Stoke summer signing prepares for take off
arts.sum: I spoke to one of my good mates at Fleetwood in Danny Mayor and he said he played some of his best football at Fleetwood as an attacking number 8, he scored his goals from that position – but he was recruited by Fleetwood as a centre-back, played against Derby as a right-back and did really well. Robins knew it wasn’t a role he played often before but it sounds like he has faith and expectations in Lawal as a player and as an athlete to make an impact as he is eased into action in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Stoke City sent brutal 'already relegated' warning as major worries revealed
arts.sum: Stoke City have been told they could already have been relegated but for their star player … goalkeeper Viktor Johansson . Goodman told the OLBG website : “Stoke City's win at Hull was huge.
